impact: This advances PP&D requirement extraction by adding deterministic expected output for Urban Forestry permit analysis without live crawling, private DevHub artifacts, or broad contract changes.
summary: Add a narrow Urban Forestry expected-output fixture and validation test for exactly seven source-backed redacted requirement categories.
target_task: Task checkbox-104: Add a minimal Urban Forestry permit requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly seven category records: eligibility, plan-review applicability, upload requirements, fee/payment checkpoints, corrections, inspections/finalization, and explicit-confirmation gates, all source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
